  "notes": "Source is Exhibit on page 50 'Probability of Retirement' printed as Age rows x Years-of-Service columns, the reverse of the target orientation, so transpose=true. After transpose, printed columns (<15, 15-24, 25-31, >31) become rows mapped to the target service buckets, and printed age rows become target age columns. Values are percentages (values_unit=percent). Service bin spans read as: '<15' -> [null,14], '15-24' -> [15,24], '25-31' -> [25,31], '>31' -> [32,null]. Target service buckets 5-11 and 12-19 both fall entirely within '<15' (rate 0.00 for all ages except age 60+ where <15 has positive rates); 20-24 falls entirely in '15-24'; 25-29 and 30 fall entirely in '25-31'; 31-32 spans the 25-31 (year 31) and >31 (year 32) source bins so uses overlap_weighted; 33-34, 35-39 and 40 fall entirely in '>31'. Age columns: single ages inside a printed age group copy that group's rate; ages inside grouped bins (50-51, 55-58, 66-69) use overlap_weighted (all ages within a group share the same rate so copy would be equivalent). Total rows/columns excluded (this table prints no totals)."
}
